tagline: Born from light. Made with weight.

chapters.name: ORIGIN
chapters.subtitle: Chaos — the yawning gap before form
chapters.description: The first chapter. From nothing, form. The current relic is offered in the sanctuary in a fixed and final quantity — when it closes, it moves here, permanently.

chapters.name: EREBUS
chapters.subtitle: primordial darkness
chapters.description: Unwritten. The second chapter remains sealed until it is opened deliberately.

chapters.name: AETHER
chapters.subtitle: pure upper light
chapters.description: Unwritten. The closing chapter of the first genealogy.

seedProduct.name: THE FIRST FORM — 001/001
seedProduct.description: A private archive sample built from heavyweight cotton, designed to define the first visual language of ÆTHER ORIGIN. Minimal at the front, powerful at the back, cut with weight and made for permanence.
